title: BR-002A: execute the tool_kind empirical gate; record results + fix patch-plan step 3 (docs-only)
intent: Run the tool_kind ground-truth check the BR-002A proof called for (read-only, temp RMOS_RUNS_DIR): persist 3 artifacts via the real store_api.store_artifact and observe the actual persisted structure. Findings: the three-state model (meta.tool_kind in {saw, saw_lab, missing}) is confirmed by observation; but tool_kind is NOT a top-level index field (_extract_index_meta omits it) - it lives in m['meta']['tool_kind'] and leaks into mode/tool_id, so a filter reading m['tool_kind'] literally matches 0/3 and would drop every artifact. Record the results, mark the empirical-gate checklist item executed, and correct BR-002B patch-plan step 3 to read meta.tool_kind (or hoist it into _extract_index_meta with an index rebuild). Documentation plus this governance manifest only; no production code, schema, route, or build change.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds the empirical-gate results section to BR-002A_PROOF.md, marks the gate checklist item executed, and corrects patch-plan step 3 (read meta.tool_kind, not top-level). No source, schema, route, or test file touched.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The empirical check caught a catastrophic literal-implementation bug (a top-level tool_kind filter drops everything) that three prior code-reading passes missed; recording it prevents BR-002B from shipping it.

commands_run: python probe with temp RMOS_RUNS_DIR: store_api.store_artifact x3 (saw / saw_lab / empty) -> rebuild_index -> read index
observed: tool_kind absent at top level; present in meta.tool_kind in {saw, saw_lab, missing}; leaks to mode/tool_id
m.get('tool_kind')==req matched 0/3; m['meta']['tool_kind']==req matched 1/3; list_runs_filtered(tool_kind=) raised TypeError

files.intent: CBSP21 manifest for the empirical-gate docs change.
record empirical-gate results; mark gate executed; fix patch-plan step 3 (read meta.tool_kind).

no_backend_no_schema: No backend API, route, schema, persistence, or build change. All changes are documentation under docs/remediation/ plus this CBSP21 governance manifest. No production code is touched (the empirical probe ran read-only against a throwaway temp store and changed no tracked file).
